title: Fix translation keys displaying as raw text instead of translated values

requirements.text: Update ResumeDraftDialog.tsx to wrap the 'draft.resumeTitle' and 'draft.resumeMessage' translation keys with the t() translation function so they display as translated text instead of raw keys.

quotes: translation keys like 'draft.resumeTitle' were still showing as raw text

acceptanceCriteria: The resume draft dialog displays 'Resume Your Survey' (or Hindi equivalent) instead of 'draft.resumeTitle'
The dialog message shows the translated text instead of 'draft.resumeMessage'
The translation function t() is called for all user-facing text in the dialog

requirements.text: Review and fix any other components across the survey wizard (Steps 1-9, SurveyWizard.tsx, ProgressIndicator.tsx) where translation keys are being displayed as raw text instead of calling the t() function to convert them to translated values.

quotes: translation keys are still showing as raw text
UI components aren't calling the translation function t()

acceptanceCriteria: All user-facing text in survey components displays translated values instead of raw i18n keys
The t() function is properly imported and used for all text that should be localized
Switching between English and Hindi correctly updates all displayed text

constraints: Do not modify the immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Use the existing i18n translation system with the t() function from LanguageContext
The translation keys already exist in en.ts and hi.ts files - only fix the component calls
nonGoals: Adding new translation keys (they already exist)
